response.justification: While Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack engineering expertise and experience with low-latency systems optimization, the role requires specialized knowledge in SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, and AI accelerator optimization that is entirely absent from his background. His 15-year career trajectory has been in web and backend services, not hardware architecture, creating a fundamental domain mismatch for a principal-level position.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering across multiple languages and platforms demonstrates strong technical foundation
Experience optimizing low-latency, high-throughput microservices systems shows capability in performance analysis
Deep infrastructure and systems expertise with DevOps, CI/CD, and architectural design across diverse domains
concerns: Zero demonstrated experience with hardware architecture, SoC design, or IP modeling—the core competency for this role
No background in GPU architecture, AI accelerators, or deep learning workload optimization—critical requirements
Recent career increasingly focused on web/product engineering and full-stack development, diverging from hardware systems expertise

key_factors.factor: Missing hardware architecture and SoC/IP modeling foundation
Lack of AI accelerator, GPU, or deep learning infrastructure experience
Strong performance optimization and systems engineering background
